response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:43: Identified song as 'My Soul, Your Beats!' by Lia, performed by Hololive members. Searched and found lyrics. 2. 03:44-05:00: Identified song as 'Kanseitou yori' (管制塔より) by Hakui Koyori, composed by Shota Horie. Searched and found lyrics. 3. Generated JSON response with accurate timestamps and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by Hololive VTubers. It includes a group performance of 'My Soul, Your Beats!' followed by a solo performance of the original song 'Kanseitou yori' by Hakui Koyori.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori, Shishiro Botan, and Sakura Miko perform 'My Soul, Your Beats!'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Shishiro Botan, Sakura Miko
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐるとほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
見送った
手を振った
よかったね、と

廊下の隅見下ろす 掃除の途中
おかしなものだと思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きてるように
埃は雪のように降り積む
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震え出す今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語
永遠の
その終わり

いつの間にか駆けたしてた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く 明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が踊った
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え 新しい陽が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った
手を振った
ありがとう、と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I open my eyes again, to a sleepy morning
I tighten the tie around my neck
When I pass through the classroom door I can walk in with my chest puffed out proudly
Such a wind blows past everyday life
I thought I heard it
I even thought I felt it
Now it starts to shake within my chest
I thought it would come soon
As those millions of stars vanished
I watched them fade
I waved them good-bye
I'm glad

Overlooking the corner of the hall as I sweep
I think something is odd
Even though the time within me has stopped
Its like I'm living different days
The dust falls and piles up like snow
I thought they were waiting
I even thought they were calling out
Now my time starts to shake
I thought I found it
I awaken lost memories
That's the end
Of the eternal
Story

Before I knew it I was running
You were pulling my hand
Yesterday is long past; Tomorrow is just ahead
My heart raced at such obviousness
I thought I heard it
I even thought I felt it
Now it starts to shake within my chest
I thought it would come soon
The new day passes through thousands of mornings
I thought it was waiting
I even thought it was calling out
My soul is shaking
I thought I found it
Like millions of dreams the day can vanish
I watched it fade
I waved it good-bye
Thank you

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs her original song 'Kanseitou yori'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように綴った
これからのこと
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
お便り 届いていますか
この世界がいつからか
まるで他人事のように
やけに静かなので
不安になったのです
思い出したのです
人知れず口を噤んだまま
終われないのです
それは嫌なのです
夢ってもっと
わがままだったでしょう
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう
どうしても、伝えたいよ

ラジオネーム 匿名希望
意気地無しなのでしょうか
それともこの世界には
ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか
だとしても綴るよ
みっともなく叫ぶよ
フラれたって好きだよ
いいでしょ
いいでしょ
楽しかったよね
悔しかったよね
もう独り言は、嫌だ

「待たせちゃったかな」
「別に待ってないよ」
夢と呼んだ それもぼくだっただけ
もういいかい
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
ぼくだけは、光と呼び続ける
真夜中 管制塔から
世界を明かしてやる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Point-like lights, control tower
Towards the other side of the sandstorm
I wrote down as if in prayer
About what comes next
Radio name, wish to remain anonymous
Are you receiving this letter?
I wonder when this world
Became so strangely quiet
As if it had nothing to do with me
I became anxious
I remembered
I cannot end it
While keeping my mouth shut
I hate that
Dreaming was supposed to be more
Selfish, wasn't it?
Answer me, smile, notice me
I'm right here, you're mean
That light that reaches no one
What should I do, how can I convey it?
No matter what, I want to convey it

Radio name, wish to remain anonymous
Am I too cowardly?
Or is there no place for me
In this world?
Even so, I will write it
I will shout unseemly
Even if I get dumped, I still love you
It's fine, isn't it?
It's fine, isn't it?
It was fun, wasn't it?
It was frustrating, wasn't it?
I don't want to talk to myself anymore

"Did I keep you waiting?"
"I wasn't really waiting"
That which I called a dream
Was just me all along
Ready yet?
Answer me, smile, notice me
I'm right here, you're mean
That light that reaches no one
I alone will continue to call it light
From the control tower in the middle of the night
I will reveal the world (you)
